---
title: "Teaching"
---

**ETH Zürich**, Department of Humanities, Social and Political Sciences

- *Introduction to Political Science* (lecture, co-taught), 2023, 2024
- *Methods I: Research Design* (seminar, co-taught), 2022
- *Methods II: Quantitative and Qualitative Methods for the Social Sciences* (seminar, co-taught), 2023
